shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "useController control changes runtime field onChange old control" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "useController dynamic control writes register props" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "useController reads can follow a new control through useWatch/useFormState while the cached _registerProps handlers remain bound to the old control. When control identity changes at runtime, refresh _registerProps from the active control during render so field.onChange and field.onBlur write and mark touched state on the same control that supplies field.value. Regression coverage should switch two useForm controls without unmounting and assert both writes stay on the new form." -t "useController control switch must refresh write handlers" --unit-type learning -l label_react-hook-form -l label_useController -s codex -i 0.8'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && nl -ba src/useController.ts | sed -n '94,122p' && nl -ba src/__tests__/useController.test.tsx | sed -n '1738,1765p'"
